result:
我已完整掃描 `kernel/` 子樹下所有 `.c` 檔案中 `wake_up_process()` 的直接呼叫(排除註解、字串,以及其他 `wake_up_*` 變體如 `wake_up_q`/`wake_up_locked` 等,但保留 `wake_up_process` 本身的呼叫)。

## 結果:共 **47** 個呼叫點

| # | file:line | 所在函式 (caller) |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | kernel/cpu.c:755 | `__cpuhp_kick_ap` |
| 2 | kernel/audit_tree.c:965 | `audit_schedule_prune` |
| 3 | kernel/exit.c:170 | `__exit_signal` |
| 4 | kernel/exit.c:311 | `rcuwait_wake_up` |
| 5 | kernel/exit.c:760 | `exit_notify` |
| 6 | kernel/pid.c:146 | `free_pid` |

| 12 | kernel/workqueue.c:1142 | `kick_pool` |

| 24 | kernel/trace/trace_osnoise.c:1813 | `timerlat_irq` |
| 25 | kernel/trace/trace_osnoise.c:1819 | `timerlat_irq` (同函式第二處呼叫) |
| 26 | kernel/trace/ring_buffer_benchmark.c:268 | `ring_buffer_producer` |
| 27 | kernel/trace/ring_buffer_benchmark.c:293 | `ring_buffer_producer` (同函式第二處呼叫) |

| 29 | kernel/trace/trace_hwlat.c:452 | `start_single_kthread` |
| 30 | kernel/irq/manage.c:1286 | `irq_wake_secondary` |

| 35 | kernel/cgroup/freezer.c:168 | `cgroup_freeze_task` |
| 36 | kernel/sched/psi.c:1358 | `psi_show` |
| 37 | kernel/sched/cpufreq_schedutil.c:625 | `sugov_kthread_create` |

### 排除項目(非直接呼叫)
- `kernel/sched/core.c:4476` — `wake_up_process()` 的**函式定義**本身,非呼叫點
- `kernel/sched/core.c:981,999,1026`、`kernel/kthread.c:488,646,687,693`、`kernel/trace/trace_selftest.c:1236`、`kernel/time/timer.c:2111`、`kernel/time/hrtimer.c:2348,2382` — 均為**註解**中提及 `wake_up_process()`,非實際呼叫
- `kernel/bpf/cpumap.c:474` — 註解 `/* kthread_stop will wake_up_process ... */`

未修改任何檔案,以上結果僅來自唯讀掃描(`grep`/`awk`/`sed`/`Read`)。
